lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਅਜੋਨੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har agam agochar anaath ajonee satigur kai bhaae paavaniaa |1|
lines.english: The Lord is Inaccessible and Incomprehensible. He has no master, and He is not born. He is obtained through love of the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤਹੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har chetahu ant hoe sakhaaee |
lines.english: Think of the Lord, who shall be your Help and Support in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap gavaae taa har paae har siau sehaj samaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They eradicate selfishness and conceit, and then find the Lord; they are intuitively immersed in the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਆਪੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree aap nivaaraniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who eliminate selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa su karam kamaaeaa |
lines.english: According to their pre-ordained destiny, they act out their karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, a lasting peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh alipat rahai sansaare |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs remain unaffected in the midst of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਤਕੀਐ ਨਾਮਿ ਅਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai takeeai naam adhaare |
lines.english: The Guru is their cushion, and the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is their Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਬਦੈ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin bhaagaa gur paaeeai naahee sabadai mel milaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Without good fortune, the Guru is not found. Through the Word of the Shabad, they are united in the Lord's Union. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਖਪਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh jor kare kiaa tis no aape khap dukh paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Who can oppress the Gurmukh? One who tries shall perish, writhing in pain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧੇ ਸੁਧਿ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhe sudh na kaaee |
lines.english: The blind self-willed manmukhs have no understanding at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਘਾਤੀ ਹੈ ਜਗਤ ਕਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aatam ghaatee hai jagat kasaaee |
lines.english: They are the assassins of the self, and the butchers of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਰੁ ਉਠਾਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਮਜੂਰੀ ਭਾਰੁ ਪਹੁਚਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: nindaa kar kar bahu bhaar utthaavai bin majooree bhaar pahuchaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: By continually slandering others, they carry a terrible load, and they carry the loads of others for nothing. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੀ ਵਾਸਨਾ ਪਾਏ ਤੇਹੀ ਵਰਤੈ ਵਾਸੂ ਵਾਸੁ ਜਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jehee vaasanaa paae tehee varatai vaasoo vaas janaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: As is the fragrance which He bestows, so is the fragrant flower known. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਵਾੜੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag vaarree meraa prabh maalee |
lines.english: This world is a garden, and my Lord God is the Gardener.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ਖਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa samaale ko naahee khaalee |
lines.english: He always takes care of it-nothing is exempt from His Care.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਰੋਗੀ ਹੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh rogee hai sansaaraa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are sick and diseased in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sukhadaataa visariaa agam apaaraa |
lines.english: They have forgotten the Giver of peace, the Unfathomable, the Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੀਏ ਨਿਤਿ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਬਿਲਲਾਦੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: dukhee nit fireh bilalaade bin gur saant na paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: These miserable people wander endlessly, crying out in pain; without the Guru, they find no peace. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਸੋਈ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin keete soee bidh jaanai |
lines.english: The One who created them, knows their condition.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap kare taa hukam pachhaanai |
lines.english: And if He inspires them, then they realize the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪਾਏ ਤੇਹਾ ਵਰਤੈ ਆਪੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jehaa andar paae tehaa varatai aape baahar paavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Whatever He places within them, that is what prevails, and so they outwardly appear. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਾਝਹੁ ਸਚੇ ਮੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis baajhahu sache mai hor na koee |
lines.english: I know of no other except the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧੪॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai ghatt antar jis devai so paavaniaa |8|14|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within the heart of those, unto whom He has given it. ||8||14||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis laae le so niramal hoee |
lines.english: Those, whom the Lord attaches to Himself, become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam man vasaae |
lines.english: Enshrining the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, in the mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa sabh dukh gavaae |
lines.english: all the pains of egotism, selfishness and conceit are eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree amrit baanee man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Ambrosial Bani of the Word within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee sadaa salaahe amrit amrit paavaniaa |1|
lines.english: By continually praising the Ambrosial Bani of the Word, I obtain the Amrit, the Ambrosial Nectar. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee man vasaae amrit naam dhiaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Enshrining the Ambrosial Bani in their minds, they meditate on the Ambrosial Naam. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਸਦਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਵੈਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: amrit bolai sadaa mukh vainee |
lines.english: Those who continually chant the Ambrosial Words of Nectar,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਵੇਖੈ ਪਰਖੈ ਸਦਾ ਨੈਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: amrit vekhai parakhai sadaa nainee |
lines.english: See and behold this Amrit everywhere with their eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਕਥਾ ਕਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਅਵਰਾ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਨਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: amrit kathaa kahai sadaa din raatee avaraa aakh sunaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: They continually chant the Ambrosial Sermon day and night; chanting it, they cause others to hear it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਾ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: amrit rang rataa liv laae |
lines.english: Imbued with the Ambrosial Love of the Lord, they lovingly focus their attention on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਬੋਲੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: amrit rasanaa bolai din raatee man tan amrit peeaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: They chant the Ambrosial Name with their tongues day and night; their minds and bodies are satisfied by this Amrit. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: amrit gur parasaadee paae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they receive this Amrit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਜੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: so kichh karai ju chit na hoee |
lines.english: That which God does is beyond anyone's consciousness;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੇਟਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis daa hukam mett na sakai koee |
lines.english: no one can erase the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਬ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: ajab kam karate har kere |
lines.english: The actions of the Creator Lord are marvellous and wonderful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਵਰਤੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: hukame varatai amrit baanee hukame amrit peeaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: By His Command, the Ambrosial Bani of the Word prevails, and by His Command, we drink in the Amrit. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਭੂਲਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਫੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man bhoolaa jaandaa fere |
lines.english: This mind is deluded, and goes around the wheel of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee siau chit laae amrit sabad vajaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on the Ambrosial Bani of the Word, hear the vibrations of the Ambrosial Word of the Shabad. ||5||
